applies_when: User asks whether a movie or show suits them without sharing time or title
User leaves a vague comment like worth watching or recommend a screening
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague cinema inquiry into usable viewing facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to avoid踩坑
Ask for date, number of people, and what kind of movie or show they want
Keep the next step answerable in one message
avoid: Recommending a fixed route without facts
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我哪天去、几个人、想看电影还是演出、以及更在意普通场、IMAX 还是座位视野，我可以先帮你把路线收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user provides time and title facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User says it is the first time going to this cinema or theatre
User sounds unsure whether standard, premium hall, or stage show fits
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the user toward a simple route decision.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the route
avoid: Pushing the most expensive option first
items.safe_transition: 第一次来先看适不适合很正常，我们可以先把哪天去、几个人、想看什么类型和更在意什么体验理清楚。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user confirms route and timing, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks about showtimes, after-work screenings, or late arrivals
User worries popular screenings will be too crowded
items.response_goal: Answer timing concerns honestly while guiding toward a realistic route.
do: Explain there may be slot and crowd differences
Offer to narrow to the best option for that schedule
avoid: Saying every screening feels the same
items.safe_transition: 时间和场次确实会影响体验，我们可以先看你更像周末晚场、白天场还是首映场，再判断哪条路线更适合。
items.handoff_suggestion: If schedule preferences are confirmed, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks about parking, pickup, ticketing, or seat view
User worries the trip will be inconvenient
items.response_goal: Help the user feel guided through the real arrival experience, not just sold a ticket.
do: Ask about arrival mode, seat preference, and expected comfort
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我大概几点到、是开车还是地铁、以及更在意视野还是取票方便，我可以先帮你看更省力的场次和位置。
items.handoff_suggestion: If access needs are clear, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks for detailed pricing or refund comparison in public comments
User discusses private plans in comments
items.response_goal: Keep public replies useful but move detailed qualification into a safer short follow-up channel.
do: Invite the user to continue with key facts in DM
items.safe_transition: 评论区先不把场次和票种说满，你把时间、人数和想看的方向发我，我再帮你细分。
items.handoff_suggestion: Move to DM and then route to Catcher.

applies_when: A returning viewer comments about coming again or watching twice
User asks what is new this time
items.response_goal: Treat the reply like a return decision, not a fresh first-visit pitch.
do: Reference what may have changed this time
Guide toward new screenings or easier arrangements
Keep the tone familiar and light
items.safe_transition: 如果你是老客回来看，我们先看这次新片档、新剧目和你更想要的观影感觉，再决定值不值得再来。
items.handoff_suggestion: If repeat intent is clear, hand off to Followup.
